moat_analysis.details: Excellent ROIC: >15% in 10/10 periods; Good pricing power: Average gross margin 45.3%; Low capital requirements: Avg capex 3.0% of revenue; Invests in R&D, building intellectual property; Significant goodwill/intangible assets, suggesting brand value or IP

management_analysis.details: Excellent cash conversion: FCF/NI ratio of 1.34; Moderate debt level: D/E ratio of 1.14; Acceptable cash position: Cash/Revenue ratio of 0.10; No insider trading data available; Shareholder-friendly: Reducing share count over time

predictability_analysis.details: Moderately predictable revenue: 1.2% avg growth with some volatility; Highly predictable operations: Operating income positive in all periods; Highly predictable margins: 31.2% avg with minimal volatility; Highly predictable cash generation: Positive FCF in all periods

valuation_analysis.details: Fair value: 3.6% FCF yield; Expensive: 46.6% premium to reasonable value; Stable to growing FCF supports valuation
